channel.title: Ai Eng.Md on Alans Digital Twin Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Ai Eng.Md on Alans Digital Twin Blog

item.title: Ai_Eng
item.description:
🤖 AI Application Engineering Hub

Moving from “Prompting” to “Systems Engineering.” This hub focuses on the architecture required to build reliable, scalable, and autonomous AI agents.

🧠 The Prompt & Context Layer

Focus: Reducing the search space and maximizing LLM reasoning.

  • Patterns: [[articles/ai-engineering/prompt-patterns|Structural Prompting Patterns]]
  • Memory: [[articles/ai-engineering/context-window-dynamics|Context Window Dynamics & Tokenomics]]

🔍 Retrieval & Knowledge (RAG)

Focus: Transforming “Semantic Search” into “Knowledge Synthesis.”

  • The Truth: [[articles/ai-engineering/rag-truth|Why Vector Search Fails]]
  • Deep Dive: [[articles/ai-engineering/rag-deep-dive-chunking-embedding|Chunking & Embedding Strategies]]
  • Advanced: [[articles/ai-engineering/graphrag-deep-dive|GraphRAG & Global Synthesis]] $\rightarrow$ [[articles/ai-engineering/long-context-vs-rag|Long-Context vs RAG]]

⚙️ Agentic Workflows & LLMOps

Focus: Building autonomous loops and production-grade guardrails.
